_meta.name: Manga Drama Studio Design System
_meta.purpose: Comprehensive styling guide for AI to follow when building any page or feature in this app. Every component includes exact Tailwind classes verified against the running showcase app.

stack.styling: Tailwind CSS v3 with custom theme (see tailwindConfig section)
stack.icons: Lucide React — outlined style, 1.5px stroke, rounded joins

_meta.showcase: packages/design-showcase — run `npm run dev` to see all components live

designPrinciples.summary: Soft lime canvas, pillow-white cards, one purple accent, generous rounding, maximum breathing room. The interface whispers — never shouts.

rules.name: Soft Power
rules.rule: No sharp edges anywhere. Cards use 24px radius, buttons and chips are fully rounded pills, avatars are perfect circles. The entire interface feels touchable and inviting.

rules.name: Bento Grid
rules.rule: Layout is a mosaic of self-contained white cards on a lime canvas. Cards vary in column span (1 or 2) and height (content-driven). Use CSS Grid with gap-4.

rules.name: One Accent Rule
rules.rule: Only ONE accent color: purple #7C6AF2. Used for progress rings, active toggles, today markers, focus rings, badges. If something needs emphasis, use purple or font-weight — never a second accent color.

rules.name: Breathe
rules.rule: Card padding is always p-6 (24px). Page padding is px-6 py-10. Grid gap is gap-4. Content never touches card edges. When in doubt, add more space.

rules.name: Minimal Chrome
rules.rule: Cards have NO borders and NO shadows by default — they separate from the canvas through white-on-lime contrast. Borders are only used inside cards for list dividers (border-bdr-subtle). Shadows only appear on modals and dropdowns.

rules.name: Hierarchy Through Weight
rules.rule: Use the type scale for visual hierarchy. display-sm (26px/700) for card titles, text-heading (20px/600) for sections, text-body-medium (15px/500) for list item names, text-small (13px/400) for secondary info, text-caption (11px/500) for labels.

tailwindConfig.description: Paste this into tailwind.config.js theme.extend to enable all design tokens as Tailwind classes.

customCSSUtilities.description: Add these to index.css inside @layer utilities. They define the typography scale used throughout the app.

canvasLight.usage: Lighter canvas variant for hover on canvas-level elements.

canvasDark.usage: Darker canvas for calendar range highlight, borders on canvas.

surface.usage: Card backgrounds, modals, dropdowns. Always pure white.

surfaceSubtle.usage: Nested surfaces: chips, input backgrounds, icon button hover, list item hover.

accent.usage: THE accent. Progress rings, active toggles, today marker, focus rings, badges.

accentLight.usage: Accent tint for icon containers in stat cards, empty state circles.

accentMedium.usage: Lighter interactive accent for hover states.

textPrimary.usage: Headlines, names, primary content. Also used as button bg: bg-txt-primary.

textMuted.usage: Placeholder text, disabled, ghost-month days in calendar.

border.usage: Chip borders, input borders, button outlines.

borderSubtle.usage: List dividers inside cards. Very faint.

displayLg.usage: Page hero titles. One per page maximum.

displaySm.usage: Card headlines: person names, project titles, section headers like 'Notifications'.

heading.usage: Sub-section titles, milestone names, modal titles, card section headers.

body.usage: Primary reading text: descriptions, notification messages, form labels.

bodyMedium.usage: Emphasized body: list item names, inline labels, button text.

small.usage: Secondary info: roles, timestamps, helper text, form labels.

caption.usage: Badges, calendar day headers, color swatch labels. Often uppercase.

spacing.inlineGap: gap-3 (list items), gap-2 (buttons), gap-1.5 (icon+text in buttons)

card.description: The fundamental building block. White, generously padded, large radius, no border, no shadow.

variants.interactive: bg-white rounded-card p-6 hover:shadow-card-hover transition-shadow cursor-pointer
variants.nested: bg-white rounded-card-nested p-6 shadow-modal (for modals/dropdowns overlaying content)

rules: Never add border to cards — contrast with lime canvas provides separation
Shadow only on modals (shadow-modal) and dropdowns (shadow-dropdown)
Card header pattern: flex items-start justify-between mb-5

avatar.description: Always perfectly circular with object-cover. Background fallback for loading.
avatar.notes: Use bg-surface-subtle as placeholder background while image loads.

avatarGroup.childTailwind: w-9 h-9 rounded-full ring-2 ring-white bg-surface-subtle
avatarGroup.smallVariant: w-8 h-8 rounded-full ring-2 ring-white bg-surface-subtle

buttonPrimary.description: Dark filled pill button. The main CTA per card.
buttonPrimary.tailwind: bg-txt-primary text-white rounded-full px-5 py-2.5 text-sm font-medium hover:bg-[#333] transition-colors active:scale-[0.98]
buttonPrimary.smallVariant: bg-txt-primary text-white rounded-full px-4 py-2 text-[13px] font-medium hover:bg-[#333] transition-colors
rules: Maximum one primary button per card
Use text-sm (14px) for standard, text-[13px] for compact/card-footer

buttonSecondary.description: Outlined pill button for secondary actions.
buttonSecondary.tailwind: bg-transparent text-txt-primary border border-[#E0E0E0] rounded-full px-5 py-2.5 text-sm font-medium hover:bg-surface-subtle transition-colors active:scale-[0.98]
buttonSecondary.compactVariant: border border-bdr text-txt-primary rounded-full px-4 py-2.5 text-[13px] font-medium hover:bg-surface-subtle transition-colors

buttonAccept.description: Positive action button with light green tint. Used with Check icon.
buttonAccept.tailwind: bg-[#F0F5E4] text-txt-primary rounded-full px-4 py-2 text-[13px] font-medium hover:bg-[#E4EDD4] transition-colors flex items-center gap-1.5

buttonDeny.description: Outlined button for negative/reject actions. Used with X icon.
buttonDeny.tailwind: bg-transparent text-txt-primary border border-bdr rounded-full px-4 py-2 text-[13px] font-medium hover:bg-surface-subtle transition-colors flex items-center gap-1.5

buttonGhost.description: Text-only button with no background or border.

buttonIcon.description: Circular button containing only an icon. For more-menu, navigation arrows.
buttonIcon.tailwind: w-9 h-9 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-surface-subtle transition-colors
buttonIcon.smallVariant: w-8 h-8 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-surface-subtle transition-colors shrink-0

chip.description: Pill-shaped tag for categorization. Light background, subtle border.
chip.tailwind: bg-surface-subtle text-txt-primary rounded-full px-3.5 py-1.5 text-[13px] border border-bdr

badge.tailwind: bg-accent text-white rounded-full min-w-[24px] h-6 px-2 flex items-center justify-center text-xs font-semibold

progressRing.description: SVG circular progress indicator with centered percentage text.

implementation.structure: Two <circle> elements inside <svg>: track (stroke #EEEEE8) + fill (stroke #7C6AF2, strokeLinecap round)
implementation.math: radius = (size - strokeWidth) / 2; circumference = 2 * PI * radius; offset = circumference - (pct/100) * circumference
implementation.text: <text> centered with textAnchor=middle dominantBaseline=central, class: fill-txt-primary text-[13px] font-semibold
implementation.animation: className='transition-all duration-700 ease-out' on the fill circle

toggle.description: Pill toggle switch. Purple when on, gray when off. White knob.

tailwind.track: relative w-11 h-6 rounded-full transition-colors duration-200 shrink-0
tailwind.knob: absolute top-0.5 left-0.5 w-5 h-5 bg-white rounded-full shadow-sm transition-transform duration-200

toggle.behavior: Use useState for on/off. onClick toggles state.

input.description: Text input with subtle border, rounded-xl, purple focus ring.
input.tailwind: w-full bg-white border border-bdr rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-[15px] text-txt-primary placeholder:text-txt-muted focus:outline-none focus:border-accent focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent/20 transition-all
input.label: text-small text-txt-secondary block mb-1.5

searchVariant.icon: absolute left-3.5 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-txt-muted (Search icon size={18})

input.textarea: ...same as input but add resize-none, use rows={3} or more

statusIndicator.description: Colored dot + label pill for pipeline/task status.
statusIndicator.tailwind: flex items-center gap-1.5 bg-surface-subtle rounded-full px-3 py-1.5 text-[13px] text-txt-primary

listItem.description: Standard horizontal list row: avatar + content + action.
listItem.tailwind: flex items-center gap-3 py-3.5 first:pt-0 last:pb-0

layout.left: Avatar (w-10 h-10 or w-11 h-11, shrink-0)
layout.center: flex-1 min-w-0 — name (text-body-medium text-txt-primary) + role/desc (text-small text-txt-secondary)

notificationItem.description: Extended list item with optional action buttons.
notificationItem.nameWithTimestamp: text-body-medium text-txt-primary — Name · 1h
notificationItem.actionButtons: flex gap-2 mt-3 — Accept button + Deny button

sectionHeader.description: Title + optional right-aligned element (badge, button, label).
sectionHeader.title: text-display-sm text-txt-primary (for major sections) or text-heading text-txt-primary (for sub-sections)
sectionHeader.rightSide: Badge, button, or text-small text-txt-secondary label

integrationRow.icon: w-10 h-10 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center text-white text-sm font-bold shrink-0 (with inline background color)
integrationRow.text: flex-1 min-w-0 — name (text-body-medium text-txt-primary) + desc (text-small text-txt-secondary truncate)

statCard.description: Small metric card with label + big number + icon container.
statCard.tailwind: bg-white rounded-card p-6 flex items-start justify-between
statCard.label: text-small text-txt-secondary
statCard.iconContainer: w-10 h-10 rounded-xl bg-accent-light flex items-center justify-center
statCard.gridPattern: grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4 (parent spans full width: md:col-span-2 xl:col-span-3)

dropdown.description: Floating menu with white background, medium radius, subtle shadow.
dropdown.menuItem: w-full flex items-center gap-2.5 px-3.5 py-2.5 rounded-[10px] text-[14px] transition-colors text-txt-primary hover:bg-surface-subtle

modal.backdrop: fixed inset-0 bg-[#1A1A1A]/30 flex items-center justify-center z-50
modal.content: bg-white rounded-card p-6 w-full max-w-[540px] mx-4 shadow-modal
modal.title: text-heading text-txt-primary
modal.actions: flex gap-2 mt-4 — primary button + secondary button

emptyState.iconCircle: w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-accent-light flex items-center justify-center mb-4
emptyState.title: text-heading text-txt-primary
emptyState.cta: mt-5 — primary button with Plus icon

divider.description: Barely visible horizontal line. Use sparingly.
divider.spacing: my-4 (between typography samples) or implicit via divide-y

calendar.header: flex items-center justify-between mb-5 — chevron buttons + text-heading title
calendar.dayHeaders: grid grid-cols-7 mb-1 — text-caption text-txt-muted text-center py-1.5
calendar.dayCell: flex items-center justify-center h-10 text-[14px] font-medium rounded-xl transition-colors cursor-default

profileCard.description: User profile with avatar, name, role, skill chips.
layout: Card header: flex items-start justify-between mb-5 — avatar-xl left + icon button right
Chips: flex flex-wrap gap-2 mt-4 — chip components

projectCard.description: Project overview with progress ring, title, description, team avatars.
layout: Card header: flex items-start justify-between mb-5 — ProgressRing left + icon button right

milestoneCard.description: Task milestone with title, due date, progress, assignees.
layout: Header: flex items-start justify-between mb-4 — text-heading title + primary button (small)
Metadata row: flex items-center gap-6 mt-4
— Due date: text-small label + text-body-medium value

splitView.description: For editor pages with list+detail or editor+sidebar pattern.
splitView.listDetail: grid grid-cols-[45fr_55fr] gap-4 (or flex with w-[45%] + w-[55%])

statRow.description: 4 metric cards in a row, spanning full grid width.
statRow.container: md:col-span-2 xl:col-span-3 grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4

animation.principles: Subtle and functional. Quick ease-out transitions. No bounce, no spring, no wobble.

iconography.importExample: import { MoreVertical, Check, X, Search, ChevronLeft, Plus } from 'lucide-react';

sizes.md: size={16} — dropdown items, compact icon buttons
sizes.default: size={18} — standard icon buttons, search icons

cardWithHeader.description: Most common card pattern: section header + content.
cardWithHeader.template:
Title

{/* content */}

cardWithHeaderAction.description: Card header with right-aligned button or badge.
cardWithHeaderAction.template:
Title

{/* content */}

listInCard.description: A card containing a divided list of items.
listInCard.template:
Title

{items.map(item => (
{/* avatar + content + action */}
))}

cardFooterButtons.description: Two buttons at card bottom: secondary left, primary right.

doNot: Do NOT use borders on cards — white-on-lime contrast is the separation mechanism
Do NOT use shadows on cards — only on modals (shadow-modal) and dropdowns (shadow-dropdown)
Do NOT use pure black (#000) or pure white (#fff) for text — use txt-primary (#1A1A1A)
Do NOT use sharp corners — minimum radius is rounded-xl (12px) for inputs, rounded-card (24px) for cards, rounded-full for buttons/chips/avatars
Do NOT introduce new accent colors — only purple #7C6AF2 for interactive elements
Do NOT use heavy dividers — only border-bdr-subtle (#F0F0EC) inside cards, and prefer spacing over borders
Do NOT use complex shadows — the design is flat with lime-to-white contrast
Do NOT use dark mode colors — this is a light-only design system
Do NOT use more than one primary button per card
Do NOT mix icon styles — always use Lucide React outlined icons
